english translation text: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
O Allah I ask You, for the sake of Your revealed Book,

arabic text: وَ مَا فِيهِ‏ وَ فِيهِ اسْمُكَ الْأَكْبَرُ
english translation text: and what is in it, and in it is Your greatest name,

arabic text: وَ أَسْمَاؤُكَ الْحُسْنَى وَ مَا يُخَافُ وَ يُرْجَى
english translation text: and (all) Your beautiful names, and what is feared and hoped for,

arabic text: أَنْ تَجْعَلَنِي مِنْ عُتَقَائِكَ مِنَ النَّار
english translation text: make me amongst those whom You have saved from the fire.
